dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Good morning! How are you doing today?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: I'm doing great, thanks! How about you?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Pretty good. Ready to tackle the day!
dialogue.ko: 꽤 좋아요. 오늘 하루 열심히 해봐야죠!

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Hi, what can I get for you?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Can I get a medium latte, please?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Sure! Would you like that hot or iced?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Iced, please. And can I have your name?

conversations.title: Asking for Help in a Store

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Excuse me, do you have this in a larger size?
dialogue.ko: 실례합니다, 이거 더 큰 사이즈 있나요?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Let me check in the back for you.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Thank you, I really appreciate it.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Of course! I'll be right back.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Are you free tomorrow afternoon for a quick meeting?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: I have something at 2, but I'm free after 3.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Perfect. Let's say 3:30 then.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Sounds good. I'll send you a calendar invite.

conversations.title: At a Restaurant

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Hi, a table for two, please.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Right this way. Can I start you off with something to drink?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Yes, just water for now, thank you.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: I'll be back to take your order in a moment.

key_expressions: Can I start you off with ~?
I'll be back in a moment.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Excuse me, how do I get to the nearest subway station?
dialogue.ko: 실례합니다, 가장 가까운 지하철역에 어떻게 가나요?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Go straight for two blocks and then turn left.
dialogue.ko: 두 블록 직진하신 다음 왼쪽으로 돌아가세요.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Is it within walking distance?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Yes, about a 5-minute walk.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Hello, this is Sarah. May I speak with Mr. Kim?
dialogue.ko: 여보세요, 저는 사라입니다. 김 선생님과 통화할 수 있을까요?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: He's not available right now. Can I take a message?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Yes, please tell him I called and ask him to call me back.
dialogue.ko: 네, 제가 전화했다고 전해주시고 다시 전화해 달라고 부탁해 주세요.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Of course. I'll pass along the message.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: What a beautiful day! It's so sunny outside.
dialogue.ko: 정말 날씨 좋다! 밖에 햇살이 참 좋네요.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: I know! Perfect weather for a walk.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Did you hear it might rain this weekend?
dialogue.ko: 이번 주말에 비가 올 수도 있다는 거 들었어요?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Really? I guess I'll have to change my plans.
dialogue.ko: 정말요? 계획을 바꿔야 할 것 같네요.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: I haven't been feeling well for a few days.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: What are your symptoms?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: I have a sore throat and a slight fever.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Let me take a look. Open your mouth wide, please.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Hi, I have a reservation under the name Johnson.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Welcome! Let me pull up your reservation.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: I'd like an early check-in if possible.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Your room is ready. Here's your key card.

conversations.title: Making Weekend Plans

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Do you have any plans this weekend?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Not really. What do you have in mind?
dialogue.ko: 특별히 없어요. 뭐 생각하는 거 있어요?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Want to grab lunch and catch a movie?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: That sounds like fun! I'm in.

key_expressions: What do you have in mind?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: I'd like to return this jacket. It doesn't fit right.
dialogue.ko: 이 재킷을 반품하고 싶어요. 사이즈가 맞지 않아서요.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Do you have your receipt?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Yes, here it is. I bought it three days ago.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: No problem. Would you like an exchange or a refund?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Do you have a minute? I could use some help.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Sure, what's up?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: I'm having trouble with this spreadsheet formula.
dialogue.ko: 이 스프레드시트 수식 때문에 어려움이 있어요.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Let me take a look. I think I can fix it.
dialogue.ko: 한번 볼게요. 제가 고칠 수 있을 것 같아요.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Can you take me to the airport, please?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Sure. Which terminal?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Terminal 2, Korean Air.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Got it. It'll take about 30 minutes.

conversations.title: Ordering Food for Delivery

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: I'd like to place an order for delivery.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: What would you like to order?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: One large pepperoni pizza and a side salad.
dialogue.ko: 라지 페퍼로니 피자 하나와 사이드 샐러드요.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Estimated delivery time is 30 to 40 minutes.

key_expressions: I'd like to place an order.
What would you like to order?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Hi, I don't think we've met. I'm David.
dialogue.ko: 안녕하세요, 처음 만나는 것 같은데요. 저는 데이비드예요.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Nice to meet you, David. I'm Mina.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Are you new here? I haven't seen you around.
dialogue.ko: 여기 처음이세요? 본 적이 없는 것 같아서요.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Yes, I just started last week.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Do you work out regularly?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: I try to go to the gym three times a week.
dialogue.ko: 일주일에 세 번 헬스장에 가려고 노력해요.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: That's impressive. What kind of exercise do you do?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Mostly cardio and some weight training.
dialogue.ko: 주로 유산소 운동이랑 웨이트 트레이닝을 해요.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: I'd like to check in for my flight to New York.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Can I see your passport and ticket, please?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Here you go. Do I have any baggage allowance?
dialogue.ko: 여기 있어요. 수하물 허용량이 얼마나 되나요?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: You're allowed one checked bag up to 23 kilograms.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Did you understand the lecture today?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Not really. The professor went too fast.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Same. Want to study together before the exam?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Definitely. How about Friday evening?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Hey, have you heard about the new park they're building?
dialogue.ko: 저기, 새로 짓는 공원에 대해 들었어요?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Yes! It's supposed to open next spring.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: That'll be great for the neighborhood.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Absolutely. My kids will love it.
dialogue.ko: 물론이죠. 아이들이 정말 좋아할 것 같아요.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: I'd like to open a savings account.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Sure. Do you have an ID with you?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Yes, here's my passport.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Great. What would you like to use as your initial deposit?

conversations.title: Talking About Hobbies

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: What do you do in your free time?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: I enjoy reading and hiking. What about you?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: I'm really into photography lately.
dialogue.ko: 요즘 사진 찍는 데 빠져 있어요.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: That's a great hobby. Do you post your photos anywhere?

key_expressions: What do you do in your free time?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Can you pass me the salt, please?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Sure. How much do you need?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Just a pinch. I don't want it too salty.
dialogue.ko: 조금만요. 너무 짜게 하고 싶지 않아서요.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: It smells amazing! What are you making?
dialogue.ko: 냄새 정말 좋다! 무엇을 만들고 있어요?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: My computer keeps freezing. Any idea what's wrong?
dialogue.ko: 컴퓨터가 계속 멈춰요. 뭐가 문제인지 알아요?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Have you tried restarting it?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Yes, but it didn't help.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: It might be a memory issue. Let me take a look.
dialogue.ko: 메모리 문제일 수 있어요. 제가 한번 볼게요.

conversations.title: Giving a Compliment

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: I love your presentation today. It was really insightful.
dialogue.ko: 오늘 발표 정말 좋았어요. 정말 통찰력 있었어요.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Thank you so much! That means a lot to me.
dialogue.ko: 정말 감사해요! 제게 정말 큰 의미예요.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: You clearly put a lot of work into it.
dialogue.ko: 정말 많은 노력을 기울인 게 보였어요.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: I did! I'm glad it came across well.

key_expressions: That means a lot to me.
I'm glad it came across well.

conversations.title: Expressing Gratitude

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Thank you so much for your help yesterday.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Don't mention it! I was happy to help.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Seriously, I couldn't have done it without you.
dialogue.ko: 진심으로, 당신 없이는 못 했을 거예요.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Anytime. That's what friends are for.

key_expressions: I couldn't have done it without you.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Are we still on for dinner tonight?
dialogue.ko: 오늘 저녁 약속 아직 유효한 거죠?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Yes! I'm looking forward to it.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Should we meet at the restaurant or somewhere else?
dialogue.ko: 식당에서 만날까요, 아니면 다른 곳에서 만날까요?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Let's meet at the restaurant at 7.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: I'm so sorry I'm late. Traffic was terrible.
dialogue.ko: 늦어서 정말 죄송해요. 교통이 너무 막혔어요.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: No worries, it happens. Are you okay?
dialogue.ko: 걱정 마세요, 그럴 수 있죠. 괜찮아요?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Yes, I'm fine. Sorry for keeping you waiting.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Really, it's okay. I just got here myself.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Did you just move into this neighborhood?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Yes, just last month. Still getting settled.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Welcome! It's a great area.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Thanks. Everyone seems very friendly.
dialogue.ko: 감사해요. 다들 정말 친절한 것 같아요.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Did you have any trouble finding us?
dialogue.ko: 저희 회사 찾는 데 어려움이 없었나요?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: Not at all. The directions on your website were very clear.
dialogue.ko: 전혀요. 홈페이지에 나온 길 안내가 아주 명확했어요.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.en: Great. Can I get you anything before we start?
dialogue.ko: 좋아요. 시작하기 전에 뭐 가져다 드릴까요?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.en: No thank you. I'm all set.
